sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78468" key="paranapi/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρανα-πίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n78468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fall back on one side</tr_>, of dogs copulating, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.79</biblScope> </bibl> (interpol.).</sense> </entryFree>
